summary.dataSource: tiresize.com (primary), m5board.com, martiniworks.com, mavis.com, goodyear.com, avtoreference.com
notes: BMW M6 (2005-2012): All staggered with 255/40ZR19 front, 285/35ZR19 rear
BMW M8 (2019-2026): All staggered with 275/35R20 front, 285/35R20 rear
BMW X1 (2009-2015 E84): M Sport trims have staggered setup
BMW X1 (2016-2022 F48): Non-staggered square fitment
BMW X1 (2023+ U11): New generation with larger tire sizes
BMW X2 (2018-2022): Non-staggered, all square setups
BMW X2 (2024+): New generation with larger 245-section tires
BMW X3 M Sport and M40i/M trims typically have staggered setups
